accurate.why: The summary contains no substantive content about the bill, only leftover drafting notes that make no verifiable claims.

no_hallucinations.why: The text is meta-commentary/drafting scaffolding rather than an actual summary, failing to convey any factual content about the resolution.

states_purpose.why: The summary never states that the bill disapproves a DOE rule on walk-in cooler/freezer energy conservation standards.

changes_to_existing_law.why: It fails to mention the Congressional Review Act disapproval that nullifies the DOE rule.

exceptions_conditions.why: The bill contains no material exceptions or conditions to summarize.

effective_dates.why: The summary omits the May 9, 2025 approval date and the rule's nullification timing.

major_provisions_covered.why: No operative provision is described; the summary contains only drafting notes.

objective_tone.why: The text contains no partisan advocacy or editorializing about the bill.

coherent.why: The text is fragmentary drafting scaffolding, not a coherent summary of the bill.

concise.why: The content is entirely irrelevant meta-commentary rather than substantive summary.

correct_entities.why: No agencies, programs, or statutes are actually named in the summary.

correct_figures.why: No figures or dates from the bill are stated, so none can be misstated.
